subcodes.first_line: O Thou Whose nearness is my hope, Whose reunion is my desire, Whose remembrance is my solace, and Whose entry into the court of might is my purpose and goal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من قربک رجائی و وصلک املی و ذکرک منائی و الورود فی ساحه عزک مقصدی و شطرک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
